updates.note: Chief Secretary Manoj Kumar Agarwal issued a directive on May 13, 2026, ordering the immediate closure of all unauthorized toll gates, drop barriers, and illegal collection points across the state. District Magistrates were tasked with identifying and removing these installations and submitting a consolidated list of authorized and unauthorized toll points by May 15. The government stated these illegal structures had allegedly proliferated during the previous government's tenure. ↗ Times of India | May 13, 2026

CM Suvendu Adhikari issued direct orders for a crackdown on syndicate operations, illegal sand and coal mining across West Bengal. He stated the state will adopt a zero-tolerance approach to institutional corruption and syndicate-driven extortion which had suppressed business activity. ↗ Economic Times | May 12, 2026
